name: water_solvation
prompt: Run the solvation task on water using the PM7 (mopac) method in implicit water solvent. Report the solvation free energy delta_G_solv in kcal/mol as the headline value (the solvation task also returns this quantity in eV/hartree and the separate gas- and solution-phase energies — do NOT report those as the headline value), state the method used, and surface any warnings the calculation produced about PM7 parameter coverage. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number. Use charge 0 and multiplicity 1.
